## Tier 4 eligibility criteria (all required)
- [ ] Tier 1 parity failure proven by evidence packs.
- [ ] Public-source precedent identified and classified.
- [ ] No privileged UID/platform-signing dependency.
- [ ] No package impersonation requirement.
- [ ] No copied smali or prohibited private integration pattern.
- [ ] Clear fallback for non-TS18 devices.
- [ ] Security/privacy risk review completed.
- [ ] Human approval recorded before production code changes.
